title: thelypteris repens
intro: Thelypteris repens, also known as the creeping maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris repens include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris repens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically used to treat conditions such as bronchitis, coughs, and sore throats.
